requirements.description: System must read global configuration from global-config.json and override CLI model defaults dynamically.
requirements.notes: Reads agent_models block from global-config.json at startup to set exact model versions for CLI invocations.

requirements.description: System must automatically create unique push notification topics for each project via ntfy.sh.
requirements.notes: Implements Get-GsdNtfyTopic and Initialize-GsdNotifications functions to handle project-specific ntfy topics.

requirements.description: System must support committing code changes locally on iteration and remote push reserved for terminal states.
requirements.notes: Global-config.json git toggle enabled with commit_on_iteration and push_on_terminal logic.

requirements.description: System must support multi-agent LLM council reviews for cross-validation at 6 stages across convergence and blueprint pipelines.
requirements.notes: Adds Invoke-LlmCouncil with Codex and Gemini as reviewers and Claude as synthesizer.

requirements.description: System must automatically chunk convergence council reviews into smaller groups for large projects.
requirements.notes: Implements Build-RequirementChunks and Build-ChunkContext for auto-chunking.

requirements.description: System must execute a database completeness static analysis zero-token check during final validation.
requirements.notes: Implements Test-DatabaseCompleteness checking full chain from API endpoint to Stored Procedure to Tables to Seed Data.

requirements.description: System must execute a zero-token regex security compliance scan to flag OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.
requirements.notes: Implements Test-SecurityCompliance to identify bad patterns like dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, missing Authorize, etc.

requirements.description: System must validate specification document clarity and contradiction using an AI-powered spec quality gate.
requirements.notes: Implements Invoke-SpecQualityGate running both existing consistency checks and clarity scoring.

requirements.description: System must conduct a differential code review on only modified files, falling back to full review if changes exceed a percentage.
requirements.notes: Adds Get-DifferentialContext and maintains cache for reviewed files.

requirements.description: System must evaluate standard .NET and npm builds via a pre-execute compile gate prior to git commit.
requirements.notes: Implements Invoke-PreExecuteGate with automatic prompt-driven bug fixing on failure.

requirements.description: System must execute automated per-requirement acceptance testing supporting file existence, regex, and standard CLI tests.
requirements.notes: Implements Test-RequirementAcceptance across multiple test_types defined in config.

requirements.description: System must run a static analysis scan on code files against contract specifications to enforce contract-first API design.
requirements.notes: Implements Test-ApiContractCompliance scanning controllers vs 06-api-contracts.md.

requirements.description: System must perform visual validation by capturing browser screenshots via Playwright and comparing them to Figma exports.
requirements.notes: Implements Invoke-VisualValidation integrating Playwright and ImageMagick.

requirements.description: System must scan UI source files to detect and block hardcoded CSS values enforcing design token usage.
requirements.notes: Implements Test-DesignTokenCompliance scanning CSS/TSX.

requirements.description: System must analyze data flow across the application for PII data and database migration integrity.
requirements.notes: Implements Invoke-PerIterationCompliance, Test-DatabaseMigrationIntegrity, and Invoke-PiiFlowAnalysis.

requirements.description: System must utilize speed optimizations like conditional research skip, smart batch sizing, and incremental file mapping.
requirements.notes: Implements Get-OptimalBatchSize, Update-FileMapIncremental, and Test-ShouldSkipResearch.

requirements.description: System must track lines of AI-generated code per iteration and compute token cost-per-line metrics.
requirements.notes: Implements Update-LocMetrics calculating git diff output mapping to line generation counts.

requirements.description: System must orchestrate a runtime smoke test starting the application and hitting discovered API endpoints.
requirements.notes: Implements Invoke-RuntimeSmokeTest to do runtime verifications like Test-SeedDataFkOrder and Invoke-ApiSmokeTest.

requirements.description: System must support a partitioned code review using 3-way parallel execution with rotating agents.
requirements.notes: Implements Invoke-PartitionedCodeReview dividing into three chunks.

requirements.description: System must track and manage pipeline crash recovery state via .gsd-checkpoint.json.
requirements.notes: Contains Save-Checkpoint / Restore-Checkpoint handling.

requirements.description: System must automatically create developer-handoff.md detailing setup, config, status, and known issues upon pipeline termination.
requirements.notes: Implements New-DeveloperHandoff generation.

requirements.description: System must log token costs of all agent requests accurately into token-usage.jsonl and calculate totals in cost-summary.json.
requirements.notes: Implements Initialize-CostTracking, Get-TokenPrice, Save-TokenUsage, Update-CostSummary functions.

requirements.description: System must utilize an AI Supervisor logic to identify process failures via error-context and prompt-hints across iterations.
requirements.notes: Implements supervisor.ps1 module containing Invoke-SupervisorLoop and other recovery capabilities.

requirements.description: System must execute batch requirements sequentially or in parallel using Codex, Claude, Gemini, or OpenAI compatible REST API alternatives.
requirements.notes: Implements Invoke-ParallelExecute breaking tasks concurrently.

requirements.description: System must natively support OpenAI-compatible REST API agents directly bypassing local CLI tools if specified in model-registry.json.
requirements.notes: Implements Invoke-OpenAICompatibleAgent for providers like kimi, deepseek, etc.

requirements.description: System must supply a gsd-converge command to start the 5-phase iterative loop.
requirements.notes: gsd-converge exposed as a shell function directly mapping to the underlying pipeline script.

requirements.description: System must supply a gsd-fix command for prompt injection of bug descriptions launching an abbreviated convergence cycle.
requirements.notes: gsd-fix implementation details available mapped to maintenance workflows.

requirements.description: System must supply a gsd-blueprint command to execute the file-driven blueprint generation pipeline.
requirements.notes: Exposes gsd-blueprint script call.

requirements.description: System must supply a gsd-costs command evaluating API cost dynamically tracking blueprint tokens.
requirements.notes: Script calculates comprehensive client quotes comparing LLM options via cached pricing.

requirements.description: System must safely store CLI agent tokens (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY) in Windows user registry environment variables via setup scripts.
requirements.notes: Setup script uses System.Environment logic directly for persisting token references.

requirements.description: System must supply a 3-phase parallel council requirements extraction pipeline to merge spec definitions accurately.
requirements.notes: Council extract pipeline script enables validation of document extractions via background jobs.
